zh.lifeSummary: Alice Abbott於1452年出生在英國英格蘭素瑞吉爾德福德。她於大約1470年與William Simon Abbott在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她在英國英格蘭住了大約1年。她去世於1538年在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice Abbott于1452年出生在英国英格兰素瑞吉爾德福德。她于大约1470年与William Simon Abbott在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她在英国英格兰住了大约1年。她去世于1538年在英国英格兰素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Abbott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English abbod, abbot(t), abbat ‘abbot’ (Old English abbod) or Old French abet ‘priest’. Both the Old English and the Old French term are derived from Late Latin abbas (genitive abbatis) ‘priest’, from Greek abbas, from Aramaic aba ‘father’. The nickname was presumably a joking reference to a person's behaviour. In the US, the English name is also sometimes a translation of a cognate or equivalent European name, e.g. Italian Abate , Spanish Abad , or German Abt .

History: George Abbot from Yorkshire, England, settled in Andover, MA, in 1640; he had numerous prominent descendants. George Abbott (probably not the same man) died in Rowley, MA, in 1647. Another early migrant was James Abbott, who came from Somerset, England, to Long Island, NY, in the 17th century.

variants.name: Abate
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Antonio, Carmelo, Carmine, Gaetano, Vito, Angelo, Canio, Rocco, Sal, Aldo, Carlo.

Italian: from abate ‘priest’ (from Late Latin abbas ‘priest’, genitive abbatis). It could be a nickname, perhaps given to someone who behaved in a priest-like manner, an occupational name for the servant of a priest, or it may denote an (illegitimate) son of a priest. Compare Labate .

variants.name: Abbot
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of Abbott . The spelling with one -t is more typically Scottish than English, and in Gaelic-speaking areas of Scotland, this is sometimes an Anglicized form of McNabb .

variants.name: Abbotts
meanings: topographic or occupational name from Middle English (atte) abbotes ‘(at the, of the) abbot's (house or quarters)’, a name for someone who lived or worked at such a place, presumably a servant.
variant of Abbott , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Alice Abbott was born in 1452, in Guildford, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. She married William Simon Abbott about 1470, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 2 daughters. She lived in England, United Kingdom for about 1 years. She died in 1538, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 86.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Abbottは1452年にイギリスイギリススリーグイルドフォードで生まれた。約1470年にイギリスイギリスでWilliam Simon Abbottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスに約1年間住んでいた。彼女は1538年にイギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズで86歳で死去した。

ko.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Abbott(은)는 1452년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 길드퍼드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1470년 영국 잉글랜드에서 William Simon Abbott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 영국 잉글랜드에서 약 1년 동안 살았다. 그녀는 1538년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Alice Abbott родилась в 1452 г. в местности гуаилдфорд, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Simon Abbott около 1470 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она жила в местности Англия, Великобритания около 1 лет. Она умерла в 1538 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 86 лет.

es.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Alice Abbott nació en 1452, en Guildford, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con William Simon Abbott aproximadamente 1470, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Inglaterra, Reino Unido durante unos 1 años. Murió en 1538, en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 86 años.
